church.body: Dead Dead Dead Dot Com I really do like ice cream. I also have a really big family. It has a lot of people in it. We have nice neighbors. I sold them some lemonade once. It was 25 cents. They got mad at me when I accidentally broke their window with a baseball. I like baseball a lot. I like to collect baseball cards. It is fun. My favorite baseball player is Bo Jackson. He is good. My mom says I'm not good for her cholesterol. She moved up north with some fellow. I think his name is Bill. I don't mind. Bill seems like a nice enough fellow. Mom never did well with guys, see. kerosene.body: d e a d when i was zero, i was born. AND THEN ! when i was two, i made a friend. his name was jeffrey. AND THEN ! when i was three, i hid in the closet. it was dark.   AND THEN ! when i was four, i wished i was a muppet. AND THEN! when i was five, i ate KEROSENE . AND THEN ! when i was eight, i played a game of basketball. jeffrey won. AND THEN ! when i was thirteen, i ate a sandwich. it had ham on it. but no mayonnaise. i dislike mayonnaise. AND THEN ! when i was seventeen, i lost my head. AND THEN ! when i was thirty-four, i found it. AND THE...

larry.title: LARRY SUSAN JIM
larry.subtitle: biographical fire / television
larry.body: Susan was born in 1931. She never left her home town of Farmington. Larry loved television. He left it on one night, and it started the house on fire. He died in that fire. The show he was watching was Rescue 911.

broadcastpanic.title: EMERGENCY BROADCAST

broadcastpanic.body: If you are seeing this, the station has confused you with the local signal. Do not seek shelter. The shelter is one of the rooms. The crawl will now repeat until the app forgets what television was.
